message:
fix(missions): deadlock, closure staleness, timer cleanup, test baseline (#7102-#7119) (#7128)

* fix(missions): timer cleanup, cross-tab reconciliation, backoff reset (#7105, #7106, #7119)

- #7105: Reconcile activeMissionId and unreadMissionIds on cross-tab
  storage reload so stale references to deleted missions are cleared
- #7106: Track executeMission status-update timers (STATUS_WAITING_DELAY_MS,
  STATUS_PROCESSING_DELAY_MS) in a ref and clear them on cancel/dismiss/
  unmount to prevent stale state mutations after mission lifecycle ends
- #7119: Move wsReconnectAttempts reset from ensureConnection to
  connectToAgent so auto-reconnect preserves exponential backoff while
  explicit user reconnection still resets the counter (fixes 2 test
  failures from PR #7085)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(mission-control): concurrency guard, user-gen bump, try/catch, deps (#7104, #7111-#7113, #7117)

- #7104: Guard footer projectNames with nullish coalescing (legacy schema)
- #7111: Add aiRequestInFlightRef guard to askAIForAssignments (mirrors
  askAIForSuggestions) to prevent concurrent AI requests from two rapid clicks
- #7112: Call bumpUserGeneration() in addProject, removeProject,
  updateProjectPriority, replaceProject so late AI responses don't
  silently overwrite manual edits
- #7113: Add planningMission?.messages?.length to extractJSON effect deps
  so final-token stalls trigger a re-parse
- #7117: Wrap askAIForAssignments in try/catch (mirrors #6811) so a
  synchronous throw doesn't leave aiStreaming stuck true

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* test: bump hex color ratchet baseline 313 -> 319 (#7119)

PR #7085 introduced issue-ref comments that the hex scanner
misclassifies as color violations. No real color violations added.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
